vibe_and_emotion: Focused, elite, commanding, energetic. Designed as a 'command center' for personal wellness, shifting the traditional soft wellness aesthetic into a high-performance tactical interface with high-contrast elements.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tight uppercase
rules.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight uppercase

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Control Room Grid. Dense, organized, high-utility.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strictly left-aligned text, sharp geometrical alignments. Optical alignment for icons within buttons.

surface_strategies.cards: Tactical Minimalism. Flat background (#121217), 1px solid border (border-white/10), no soft shadows.
surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glassmorphism. backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0C]/75 with 1px bottom border-white/10.
surface_strategies.active_states: Inner glow or sharp 2px bottom border in Volt Blue (#007AFF) to indicate selection.
surface_strategies.ai_coach_card: The Tracing Beam effect. Subtle moving gradient border or neon-tinted edges (border-[#007AFF]/40) to signify AI activity.

buttons.primary: bg-[#007AFF] text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-[#3395FF] transition-colors active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white font-bold hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors active:scale-95

components.inputs: bg-[#1A1A21] border border-white/10 text-white focus:border-[#007AFF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#007AFF] rounded-md transition-all
components.progress_bars: bg-[#1A1A21] rounded-full overflow-hidden. Fill should be vibrant Volt Blue (#007AFF) with no gradients.
components.charts: Recharts. Use sharp lines, no curved tension. Monochromatic blue scales or neon accents. No axis grids to maintain minimalist look.
components.badges: bg-[#1A1A21] border border-white/10 px-2 py-1 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider

motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Fade and slight slide-up (opacity 0 to 1, translateY 10px to 0).
motion_and_interaction.data_loading: Minimalist skeleton loaders using #1A1A21 pulse effect.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure pure white text on dark grey/obsidian backgrounds passes WCAG AA minimum 4.5:1. Never use dark grey text on black.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have a high-contrast focus ring (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#007AFF]).
accessibility.testing_attributes: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.

image_urls.description: Motivational mountain sunrise to be used subtly behind the Daily Quote section with a heavy dark overlay.
Athletic runner in a street marathon, suitable for the Challenges section background.
Dark abstract glowing orb, representing the AI Coach persona.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard HTML/Tailwind setup for dashboard layout. Apply the 'Control Room' grid system for the analytics and habit tracking areas.
Avoid using Shadcn's default soft card styles. Instead, override cards with bg-[#121217] and border-white/10 to match the 'Tactical Minimalism' style.
For the daily quote card, overlay the hero_background image with a heavy bg-black/70 gradient so the white text is perfectly readable.
Use Recharts for the Analytics and Vibe Score section. Disable background grid lines to maintain the sleek, dark aesthetic.
Integrate the ai_coach_avatar in the AI chat section.
Ensure all interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing.
